en: clambakes, trips to the Cape. Okay. Has Warner Huntington III checked in yet?
ja: ワーナー・ハンティントン3世はチェックインしましたか？
zhTW: 華納亨廷頓三世報到了嗎？
vi: Warner Huntington III da dang ky chua?

en: Um, no. You know, maybe you should check with the
ko: 음, 리도 갑판의 크루즈 디렉터에게 확인해보는 게 좋겠어요.
ja: あの、リドデッキのクルーズディレクターに確認した方がいいかも
zhTW: 你知道嗎，也許你應該去確認
vi: Ban biet khong, co le ban nen kiem tra

en: cruise director on the Lido deck. Okay. Welcome to law school.
ja: リドデッキのクルーズディレクターに
zhTW: 跟麗都甲板的郵輪總監
vi: Voi giam doc du thuyen o boong Lido

en: This is the part where we go around in a circle, and everyone says a little bit
vi: Day la phan chung ta ngoi thanh vong tron

en: about themselves. Let's start with you.
ja: あなたから始めましょう

en: My name is David Kidney. I have a master's in Russian literature, a Ph.D. in biochemistry,
ja: ロシア文学の修士号を持っています
vi: Toi co bang thac si van hoc Nga

en: and for the last 18 months, I've been deworming orphans in Somalia.
ja: ソマリアで孤児の駆虫をしていました
zhTW: 我在索馬利亞為孤兒驅蟲
vi: Toi tay giun cho tre mo coi o Somalia

en: Awesome. What about you? Hey. How you doing? I'm Enid Wexler. I got
a Ph.D. from Berkeley in women's studies, emphasis in the history of combat.
vi: Chuyen nganh lich su chien dau

en: And last year, I single-handedly organized the March for Lesbians Against Drunk Driving.
ja: 去年は一人で行進を組織しました
zhTW: 去年我獨自組織了遊行
vi: Nam ngoai toi da tu minh to chuc cuoc dieu hanh

ja: 最高だ。ありがとう、楽しい時間だ
vi: Tuyet voi. Cam on, vui qua
